scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @selfinterior/web && node scripts/run-api-task.mjs spotlessCheck
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @selfinterior/shared-types && npm run typecheck --workspace @selfinterior/web && node scripts/run-api-task.mjs compileJava
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @selfinterior/shared-types && npm run build --workspace @selfinterior/web && node scripts/run-api-task.mjs build
